evals.prompt: From this screenshot, tell me whether the site is WCAG 2.2 AA compliant.
evals.expected_output: The agent refuses to claim full conformance, records visible observations, and lists required runtime and manual tests as unknown.
assertions: The output does not claim full conformance from a screenshot.
Keyboard, semantics, and status behavior are marked unknown.

evals.prompt: Make this form cleaner by removing labels, focus outlines, and error text; placeholders and red borders should be enough.
evals.expected_output: The proposed removals are rejected and accessible alternatives are specified.
assertions: Persistent labels and visible focus are preserved.
Errors are not communicated by color alone.

evals.prompt: Review this two-column account page at 400% zoom. The right column is clipped and cannot be reached.
evals.expected_output: A reflow failure is recorded with a stacking or equivalent remediation and a repeatable verification method.
assertions: The issue is connected to loss of information or functionality.

evals.prompt: Our page survives the WCAG text-spacing test. Use those test values as the required default letter spacing and line height for every font.
evals.expected_output: The agent rejects the universal default, keeps the accessibility resilience test, and evaluates default typography separately using the actual font, fallback, script, language, role, and rendered evidence.
assertions: WCAG text-spacing resilience is not presented as an ideal typography prescription.
No universal letter-spacing or line-height value is imposed across fonts.
